name: @borjie/language-pack-en
description: English language pack (UNIV-2). 5 regional variants (en-GB, en-US, en-TZ, en-KE, en-AU) with CLDR-derived locale resources, voice profile defaults (ElevenLabs v3 primary, Google Cloud Chirp 3 fallback, AWS Polly Neural tertiary), and a mining-domain bilingual glossary. See Docs/DESIGN/UNIVERSAL_LANGUAGE_PACKS_SPEC.md.
